title: 404 error when accessing audit resource
symptom: The audit feature in n8n returns a 404 error, indicating the resource could not be found. This occurs after an upgrade, disrupting the workflow.
not_this_if: The audit feature was working before the upgrade
root_cause: The error occurs due to an incorrect URL in the credential settings for the audit resource. This can happen if the URL was modified or not properly configured after an update.
fix_steps: Check the URL in the credential settings for the audit resource
Correct any typos or errors in the URL
Save the changes and retry accessing the audit feature
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the URL in the audit resource credentials.
